mapper.sql: id , category_id, ticket_date, type, price, total_num, rest_num, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: insert into t_ticket (id, category_id, ticket_date, type, price, total_num, rest_num, create_time, update_time) values (#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{categoryId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{ticketDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{type,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{price,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, #{totalNum,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{restNum,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})

insert into t_ticket
id,
category_id,
ticket_date,
type,
price,
total_num,
rest_num,
create_time,
update_time,
#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{categoryId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{ticketDate,jdbcType=DATE},
#{type,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{price,jdbcType=DOUBLE},
#{totalNum,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{restNum,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
mapper.update:
update t_ticket
category_id = #{categoryId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
ticket_date = #{ticketDate,jdbcType=DATE},
type = #{type,jdbcType=INTEGER},
price = #{price,jdbcType=DOUBLE},
total_num = #{totalNum,jdbcType=INTEGER},
rest_num = #{restNum,jdbcType=INTEGER},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update t_ticket set category_id = #{categoryId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, ticket_date = #{ticketDate,jdbcType=DATE}, type = #{type,jdbcType=INTEGER}, price = #{price,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, total_num = #{totalNum,jdbcType=INTEGER}, rest_num = #{restNum,jdbcType=INTEGER}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
mapper.select: select * from t_ticket where category_id = #{categoryId} and ticket_date = #{ticketDate} and type = #{type}
